title: Vooz Nooxoo Una

{{Quote|It is accepted that there is a need for mercenaries in the galaxy. As much as the Empire strives to maintain law and order, there are still those who feel the government does not do enough.|A bounty posting on Vooz Nooxoo Una, located within the Imperial Enforcement DataCore|<ref name="Gamer" />}}
'''Vooz Nooxoo Una''', [[Bocce/Legends|Bocce]] for "'''The Patriot'''," was an alias used by a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Geneticist/Legends|biogeneticist]]–turned–vigilante crime fighter in the [[Coruscant Underworld/Legends|lower levels]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Una was able to develop a suit of [[Armor/Legends|armor]] made out of [[Engineer/Legends|engineered]] [[Plant/Legends|plant]] fibers, which he tested on himself. The armor began affecting Una's [[Brain/Legends|mind]], causing him to view himself as a hero destined to vanquish evil. During his adventures, he caught the attention of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] after an incident resulting in the [[Death/Legends|deaths]] of three [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officers]]. A [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] was placed on Una and the posting was later archived in the [[Imperial Enforcement DataCore/Legends|Imperial Enforcement DataCore]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|One individual has recently started a one-man war against crime on Coruscant. We only know him by the name "Vooz Nooxoo Una," which translates into "The Patriot" in Bocce.|A bounty posting on Vooz Nooxoo Una, located within the Imperial Enforcement DataCore|<ref name="Gamer" />}}
The individual who would take on the name "Vooz Nooxoo Una" was originally a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Geneticist/Legends|biogeneticist]] who lived during the reign of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. He developed a suit of [[Armor/Legends|armor]] created from genetically [[Engineer/Legends|engineered]] [[Plant/Legends|plant]] matter and used himself as a test subject for it. The armor began influencing his [[Brain/Legends|mind]], and he eventually became a vigilante in the [[Coruscant Underworld/Legends|Coruscant underworld]], believing that the Empire was not doing its job to combat crime. He then took on the name "Vooz Nooxoo Una," which translated from [[Bocce/Legends|Bocce]] to [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]] as "The Patriot."<ref name="Gamer" />

Initially, Una only attacked criminals in the lower levels of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], allowing the Empire to turn a blind [[Eye/Legends|eye]] to his activities. However, at some point Una attacked and [[Death/Legends|killed]] three [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officers]], prompting the Empire to send a [[Squad/Legends|squad]] of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] into Coruscant's lower levels after him. Only two of them returned from the hunt alive, having failed to capture Una. The Empire proceeded to post a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] of 7,500 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] on the vigilante, wanted dead by [[Disruptor/Legends|disintegration]]. This bounty posting was later archived in the [[Imperial Enforcement DataCore/Legends|Imperial Enforcement DataCore]].<ref name="Gamer" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|He sees himself as a hero fighting evil, when in fact he's a raging inferno, burning out of control.|A bounty posting on Vooz Nooxoo Una, located within the Imperial Enforcement DataCore|<ref name="Gamer" />}}
Vooz Nooxoo Una was an intelligent biogeneticist whose thought process was altered by the unique armor he wore. As a vigilante, he was very dedicated to his cause and thought of himself as a hero fighting evil. The Empire believed him to be a very sick individual with a warped view of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] who was quickly spiraling out of their control. The Empire also considered him armed and dangerous, and advised caution when approaching him. Una had in-depth knowledge of Coruscant's lower levels, having been able to survive living there for a long period of time. He had basic medical training and could speak several different languages, including [[Huttese/Legends|Huttese]], [[Rodese/Legends|Rodese]], and [[Quarrenese/Legends|Quarren]].<ref name="Gamer" />

===Armor===
Una crafted his unique armor from biochemically and genetically engineered plant fibers. This organic armor had a [[Color/Legends|green-yellow]], [[Wood/Legends|wooden]] appearance and a thorny surface designed to fend off physical attacks. It covered Una's entire body and had roots growing out from points along his [[Limb/Legends|legs]], though the armor still retained a relatively anthropomorphic shape. The armor was asymmetric and had round, shell-like shoulder pads and a trapezoidal helmet. The suit had retractable [[Claw/Legends|claws]] and bladed [[Gauntlet/Legends|gauntlets]], which complemented the [[Vibroblade/Legends|vibroblade]] Una carried with him. Although the armor was not [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]], long-term exposure to residual plant spores was thought to have affected Una's state of mind.<ref name="Gamer" />

==Behind the scenes==
Vooz Nooxoo Una was first referenced in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars Gamer 6|''Star Wars Gamer'' 6]] article ''[[Bounties to Die For]]'', written by [[S. Mitch Ritchie]] and illustrated by [[Ramón Pérez]]. The article was presented as an [[in-universe]] database of bounties posted throughout the Empire.<ref name="Gamer" />
